description_long: This is a modern military-style airplane with a low-profile, angular fuselage and a digital camouflage paint scheme in shades of gray. The wings are sharply swept back and feature prominent winglets, while the tail section includes twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, enclosed with a transparent canopy, and appears to be a single-seat configuration. The landing gear is visible and consists of a tricycle arrangement with a nose wheel and two main wheels. Markings on the wings and fuselage read 'AIR FORCE' and display insignia, emphasizing its military role. The overall design suggests a stealthy, agile aircraft suitable for urban or tactical operations.
description: A gray, camouflaged military airplane with swept wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. Marked 'AIR FORCE', it features a tricycle landing gear and a sleek, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular nose, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, swept wings with visible 'AIR FORCE' markings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the single-seat cockpit, landing gear, and the twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, winglets, and the digital camouflage pattern across the fuselage and wings.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit, landing gear, and the detailed tail section with twin vertical stabilizers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with upward-angled winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer (H-tail configuration).
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, fixed and exposed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a transparent canopy.
